events.name: search_docs
violations: argument 'top_k' must be integer, got str ('10')

results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — tents.
All tents sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 2-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 2.
The Larkspindle 2 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 4.
The Larkspindle 4 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Kestrelloft Ridge.
The Kestrelloft Ridge is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Duskmere Dome.
The Duskmere Dome is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Larkspindle Dome.
The Larkspindle Dome is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Kestrelloft 3.
The Kestrelloft 3 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Hollowfen 2.
The Hollowfen 2 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 3.
The Larkspindle 3 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Care Guide — tents.
To extend the life of your tents: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.
